text: Standing here, I feel a sense of anticipation—curiosity kindling within me as light from the glowing screens spills out into the otherwise sterile hallway. Entering this space, I am swept by the energy of innovation and thought—the exposition of research and development stirs my own habit of questioning. Reading the words displayed before me, I see my own presence reflected in their provocation. I feel both engaged and slightly detached—an observer, yet also woven into this tapestry of ideas and technological wonder.
